messages.content: hi
Hello! How can I assist you today?
i Had made a recipe video of lucknow famous idrees biryani also called doodhwali biryani make catchy tagline for thumbnail like this"रेस्तरां से भी स्वादिष्ट मटर मशरूम घर पर बनाएं, स्वाद का है वादा!"
"लखनऊ की मशहूर इदरीस बिरयानी अब आपके घर – स्वादिष्टता का शाही राज खोलें!"
more
"दूधवाली बिरयानी का असली स्वाद – लखनऊई जायके का मजा, अब आपकी रसोई में!"
something like ghar par aasani se banaye lucknow ki famous doodhwali biryani
"घर पर आसानी से बनाएं लखनऊ की फेमस दूधवाली बिरयानी – शाही खाने का राज़!"
more list

1. "लखनऊ स्टाइल दूधवाली बिरयानी – घर पे बनाये आसानी से, स्वाद बेजोड़!"
2. "घर पर चटकारे के साथ बनाएं लखनऊ की मशहूर दूधवाली बिरयानी!"
3. "स्वादिष्ट दूधवाली बिरयानी, घर में बनाएं लखनऊ का करिश्मा!"
4. "घर पे महसूस करें लखनऊ की गलियों का स्वाद – दूधवाली बिरयानी रेसिपी!"
5. "असली लखनवी ज़ायके की दूधवाली बिरयानी – घर बैठे बनाएं, स्वाद से भरपूर!"
6. "लजीज़ दूधवाली बिरयानी की सरल रेसिपी – लखनऊ का स्वाद, अब घर पर!"
7. "खुद बनाएं, लखनऊ का तड़का – दूधवाली बिरयानी अब घर पर!"
8. "लखनऊ की पारंपरिक दूधवाली बिरयानी रेसिपी – घर पर स्वाद का सफर!"

Feel free to pick any that captures the essence of your video perfectly!
As I had made video to target indian audience so make catchy strong SEO title in combination of english and hindi char
"Authentic Lucknowi Doodhwali Biryani Recipe | घर पर बनाएं असली लखनऊ स्टाइल दूधवाली बिरयानी"
add idrees also
"Idrees Biryani Secret Revealed! | इदरीस की दूधवाली बिरयानी अब आपके घर – DIY Lucknowi Recipe"
mix with this Authentic Lucknowi Doodhwali Biryani Recipe | घर पर बनाएं असली लखनऊ स्टाइल दूधवाली बिरयानी
"Idrees Style! Authentic Lucknowi Doodhwali Biryani Recipe | इदरीस स्टाइल दूधवाली बिरयानी – असली लखनऊ स्वाद घर पर"
good now make Strong SEO description

Discover the royal flavors of Lucknow with our step-by-step video tutorial on making the famous Idrees Doodhwali Biryani right in your kitchen. This authentic recipe brings the aromatic spices and rich textures of Idrees's iconic biryani to your dining table. Whether you're a die-hard fan of traditional Lucknowi cuisine or a home cook looking for new culinary adventures, this video is your gateway to mastering the art of biryani making. From selecting the perfect ingredients to the final garnish, we'll guide you through each detail to ensure your biryani is as flavorful and savory as the classic served in the streets of Lucknow. Cook, savor, and enjoy the essence of Idrees Biryani at home – satisfaction guaranteed for your taste buds!

Remember to LIKE, SHARE, and SUBSCRIBE for more delicious recipes and cooking insights! #IdreesBiryani #LucknowiDoodhwaliBiryani #AuthenticIndianCuisine #HomeCooking #FoodLovers #BiryaniRecipe #CookWithUs #TasteOfLucknow #IndianFoodRecipe

Join us on this delectable journey, and let's bring the taste of Lucknow's famous Idrees Biryani to your home. Watch now and unfold the secret to a perfect pot of Doodhwali Biryani. Happy cooking!

(Note: Adjust the hashtags and the calls to action according to the actual content of your channel and video.)
use english hindi both to make it SEO strong

Experience the authentic taste of Lucknow with our exclusive recipe video! Watch and learn as we reveal the secrets to crafting the legendary Idrees Doodhwali Biryani right in your own kitchen. "अब घर पर बनाएं इदरीस की प्रसिद्ध दूधवाली बिरयानी" with our easy-to-follow guide that infuses traditional Lucknowi flavors into your home cooking. 

Whether you're a seasoned chef or a curious food enthusiast, our video is tailored to help you recreate the rich, indulgent experience of Idrees Biryani. "लखनऊ के असली स्वादों का सफर" begins with selecting the finest ingredients, mastering the perfect blend of spices, and ends with a biryani so aromatic, it transports you straight to the heart of Lucknow. 

Don't miss out – "स्वादिष्ट रेसिपीज के लिए SUBSCRIBE करें और SHARE करें!" Join our food community for more mouth-watering dishes and culinary tips. #IdreesDoodhwaliBiryani #LucknowiCuisine #दूधवालीबिरयानी #कुकिंग #IndianRecipes #Foodies #खाना #BiryaniLovers #HomeMade

Ready to dive into the world of Lucknowi biryani? Click the video, follow along, and "घर पर बनाएं रेस्तरां जैसा भोजन" with our perfected Idrees Doodhwali Biryani recipe. Happy cooking!

(Note: Alter hashtags and calls to action as per your actual video content and channel's theme on YouTube.)

separated by comma in para form

more

Absolutely, here's an expanded list of tags to further enhance your video's search engine visibility:

"Idrees Biryani Cooking, Doodh Biryani Tutorial, Best Biryani Recipe, Lucknow Famous Biryani, Indian Street Food Recipes, Easy Biryani at Home, Flavourful Biryani Dish, Perfect Biryani Guide, ईदरीस बिरयानी विधि, घर पर बिरयानी बनाना, लखनऊ शैली बिरयानी, Indian Rice Dish, राइस डिश रेसिपी, Spicy Biryani Recipe, खाना खजाना, Biryani Masala, कुकिंग टिप्स हिंदी में, Food Vlogging, रसोई रेसिपीज, Biryani Lovers, बिरयानी पकवान, Desi Biryani, Biryani Banane ki Vidhi, लखनऊ इदरीस बिरयानी, DIY Indian Cuisine, भारतीय खाना पकाने की विधि"

Include these tags within your video metadata to assist viewers in finding your content when they search for Biryani or Indian cooking-related topics online.
